name: Justice B.R. Gavai
bio: Justice Bhushan Ramkrishna Gavai is a judge of the Supreme Court of India who is set to become the Chief Justice of India in 2025. He started his legal career as an advocate at the Nagpur Bar and was later elevated to the Bombay High Court. He is the second judge from the Scheduled Caste community to be appointed to the Supreme Court and is known for his strong commitment to constitutional values, social justice, and environmental protection.
